task_description: Implement 4 features for the code project mode: (1) persistent undo history per file tab, (2) APK install prompt after build, (3) library dependency management via libs/ folder, (4) logcat viewer panel.

verification.summary: All features compile successfully with ./gradlew assembleDebug. No unit tests exist for this module (Android app without test coverage for codeproject package). Post-implementation review findings addressed in a follow-up commit.
